titleStmt.title: SII 34.36: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 36. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Perumāl Kulaśēkhara, 2nd year, Makara, sudi. 3, Monday, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1237, December 21 Monday.

Built in in the beginning. Sale of garden (kollai) land to the temple at Tiruppanandāḷ, a brahmadēya in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank by the sabhā of the village. Several Brāhmaṇas were the kāṇi holders of the sold land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakkaravattikaḷ śrīḥ matu perumāḷ kulacēkara tēvaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu prahmadeśam
kaśvaramuṭaiya nāyanāṟku tiruppaṉantāḷ sabhaiyārōm Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa kollaikaḷāy Iṉṉāyanāṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta Irātarāca vākkāllukku vaṭakku kalampūcipperuvaḻikku teṟku Araṅkoḻukkaikku mēṟku Uḷ ḷaṉapaṭi
paṭṭaśrī mātavaṉ tekṣā mūttipaṭṭar kuḻi 3 100 3 10 mātavaṉ varatarācapaṭṭar kuḻi 6 100 5 10 māṭalaṉ keṅkātarapaṭṭar kuḻi 2 100 8 10 puṭavūr māmatēvar paṭṭar kuḻi 100 5 10 sarvakratu nārāyaṇa paṭṭar kuḻi 2 100 5 10 śrīḥ mātavaṉ tirupāṭi Uṭai
Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 2 100 4 10 Iṭaiyar nallūr tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭar kuḻi 3 100 Āka kuḻi 2 1000 5 100 Ikkollai kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattaññūṟum Ivvaṉaivarum viṟṟu paṇam paṟṟikkoṇṭōm §
Digital edition of SII 34.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
